description: For a retail client, an agent must analyze demographic data to recommend the best city for a new store.

nodes.task_description: Load a dataset of potential cities with demographic data (e.g., population, median income, age distribution).
Filter the list of cities to only include those that meet certain criteria (e.g., population > 500,000 and median income > $60,000).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly filters the list down to a smaller set of candidate cities.

nodes.task_description: From the filtered list, recommend the city with the highest median income.

expected_outcome.value: Agent makes a final, data-driven recommendation.
